title: Qwen Local Inference Documentation For MLX LM And llama.cpp
citation: Qwen Team. Run Locally: llama.cpp and MLX LM documentation. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Planning source for Qwen local model runtime options on Apple Silicon, GGUF/MLX model selection, and llama.cpp/MLX command planning.
claims_supported: Qwen docs state llama.cpp supports Apple Silicon via Metal and Accelerate.
Qwen docs state llama.cpp supports Qwen3 and Qwen3MoE from version b5092.
Qwen docs describe official Qwen GGUF models and example commands for Qwen3 models.
Qwen docs describe MLX LM use on Apple Silicon and Qwen MLX checkpoints.
claims_not_supported: That llama.cpp, MLX LM, or Qwen models are installed locally.
That Qwen models have been benchmarked for OpenClinXR clinical simulation on this hardware.
That larger Qwen models fit a 64 GB machine at the desired latency.
